name: root-measure-user
description: Release-oriented Root Measure user workbench with a single root-measure CLI, guided wizard, raw rv.exe passthrough, transparent runs, artifact inspection, reproducibility checks, and expected-CSV comparison.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze root images through one CLI or guided Codex workflow, while preserving full rv.exe control.
interface.longDescription: A release-oriented Root Measure companion with a single root-measure command, an interactive analysis wizard, validated-toolchain checks, transparent measurement runs, raw rv.exe passthrough, artifact inventories, features.csv inspection, viewer.html links, manifest tracing, failure-log troubleshooting, and generic expected-CSV comparison for public-data reproduction.
defaultPrompt: 帮我用 Root Measure 分析这批根系图，我有 DPI 或 pixels/mm
启动 Root Measure 分析向导
检查 Root Measure 工具链和发布状态
